reviews.review_title: Rules are way to specific and strict
reviews.review_description: So I almost got banned twice 1 for ghost trolling my friend the other one is using mods in an infection and as a disclaimer the mods are completely free. I saw a kid almost get banned for having 3 letters in his username the letters are TBT apparently only members of the clan can use that. If you’re gonna make the rules strict and let people not have fun then don’t put mods at all. All in all this game is fun and good just to strict I got reported and spam reported like 40 times at this point for very minor things it’s dumb actually I take back this game being good it sucks never get this it’s a waist of time
